title: arctotis reptans
intro: Arctotis reptans, also known as the creeping oxeye daisy or reptile's gold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arctotis reptans include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for its medicinal properties, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
